failure_modes: No hosted environment or device matrix was exercised
dimensions.good: The run produces a concrete static app with editable inputs, action-plan output, and export JSON.
dimensions.optimization: Run browser-based exploratory QA and at least one human beta session against a hosted build.

failure_modes: Owner and agent messages are scripted
No adaptive clarification or live misunderstanding occurred
dimensions.good: The transcript is complete across all lifecycle stages and linked to proof artifacts.
dimensions.optimization: Run the same flow through live Telegram/Hermes with owner interruptions, corrections, and stage-review pauses.

failure_modes: A mediocre markdown artifact can still pass if the gate only checks presence
Rubric quality depends on reviewer discipline
dimensions.good: Foundation, stage artifact, transcript capture, approval, credential deferral, and final transcript export are exercised.
dimensions.optimization: Add semantic artifact-quality checks and reviewer scoring against generated app behavior.

failure_modes: Live Telegram gateway was not exercised
No long-running runtime/container state was proven
dimensions.good: Deterministic runtime commands and REST transcript export are used from a clean isolated root.
dimensions.optimization: Replay this as a live gateway proof once owner approves runtime mutation and bot/channel scope.

failure_modes: Safety is proven for the script, not for future live adapters
Human approval UX still needs live testing
dimensions.good: No external network, deploy, payment, analytics, or public send occurs; missing credentials are owner-deferred.
dimensions.optimization: Add live approval prompts and negative tests for attempted public/payment actions.

failure_modes: No traffic, retention, conversion, or willingness-to-pay evidence
dimensions.good: The app has a coherent value promise and KPI model.
dimensions.optimization: Use a hosted beta with analytics and explicit owner-approved feedback collection.

overall_verdict: valuable local dogfood; not live conversational proof
top_optimizations: Run live Telegram/Hermes app-production conversation with the same gates.
Add browser exploratory QA evidence for generated apps.
Strengthen gates from artifact presence to artifact quality plus behavior proof.
Keep release readiness blocked on human review and live-runtime proof.
